title: pteris mickelii
intro: Pteris mickelii, a type of fern also known as Mickel's brake, is a species of flowering plant in the family Pteridaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pteris mickelii include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to support immune function and protect against oxidative stress. Pteris mickelii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
